## Type of Change

- [ ] Skill instructions
- [ ] Research basis / references
- [ ] Deterministic script

## Checks

- [ ] I ran `python scripts/generate_skill_catalog.py` after changing skills or references.
- [ ] I ran `python -m unittest tests.test_skill_repository`.
- [ ] I ran `python -m mkdocs build`.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, personal data, private simulation traces, or temporary build artifacts.
- [ ] New or changed models include references, variables, update rules, and default parameters.
